heading: Cooperative efforts to control development and encourage conservation
label: 460nnn–42 Cooperative efforts to control development and encourage conservation
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in subsecs. (a), (b), and (d), was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Steens Mountain Cooperative Management and Protection Act of 2000, which is classified generally to this subchapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 106–399114 Stat. 1655section 460nnn of this titleOct. 30, 2000

children.heading: Policy
children.label: a Policy
children.text: Development on public and private lands within the boundaries of the Cooperative Management and Protection Area which is different from the current character and uses of the lands is inconsistent with the purposes of this subchapter.

children.heading: Use of nondevelopment and conservation easements
children.label: b Use of nondevelopment and conservation easements
children.text: The Secretary may enter into a nondevelopment easement or conservation easement with willing landowners to further the purposes of this subchapter.

children.heading: Conservation incentive payments
children.label: c Conservation incentive payments
children.text: The Secretary may provide technical assistance, cost-share payments, incentive payments, and education to a private landowner in the Cooperative Management and Protection Area who enters into a contract with the Secretary to protect or enhance ecological resources on the private land covered by the contract if those protections or enhancements benefit public lands.

children.heading: Relation to property rights and State and local law
children.label: d Relation to property rights and State and local law
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter is intended to affect rights or interests in real property or supersede State law.
